untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of official statements and empirical data contradictions, which are external event-based inputs not available in price/technical indicators. The core trigger (statement vs. hard data contradiction within 1-2 days) cannot be expressed using only OHLCV and standard technical indicators. A calendar/news feed integration with semantic analysis would be required.
translation_notes: Attempted to proxy the 'early dislocation' component using volume spikes (vol_ratio_20) and Bollinger Band positioning (bb_pct_b > 0.7 indicating price extension). Exit conditions use 2.5x risk threshold approximated as -2.5% returns. However, the fundamental signal—detection of statement/data contradiction—requires external event data ingestion and cannot be fully captured in this technical framework. Recommend supplementing with an event trigger layer.
